nasb.text: They keep saying to those who despise Me, ‘The Lord has said, “You will have peace” ’; And as for everyone who walks in the stubbornness of his own heart, They say, ‘Calamity will not come upon you.’

esv.text: They say continually to those who despise the word of the Lord, ‘It shall be well with you’; and to everyone who stubbornly follows his own heart, they say, ‘No disaster shall come upon you.’”

cnv.text: 他們不斷對那些藐視我的人說： ‘耶和華說：你們必平安無事！’ 又對所有隨從自己頑梗的心行事的人說： ‘災禍必不臨到你們！’”

ccb.text: 他们不断对藐视我的人说，‘耶和华说你们必安享太平。’他们对那些执迷不悟的人说，‘灾祸不会降到你们身上。’
